g.text: using VS Code or any text editor. Changes are
committed to a Git feature branch.
The ValidationTool reads all model files and
Exits nonzero on failure, blocking CI and the
The ViewRenderer reads model files and
generated SVG diagrams into an HTML index.
pandoc or mkdocs for polished multi-format
The human Reviewer examines the rendered
documentation, and model diffs via a GitHub
Approves the PR (merge to main) or requests
Steps are sequential; a failure at any step
